info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud OCR API proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud OCR API API

post.description: Supports accurate detection of multi-format layouts, complex document backgrounds, and varying lighting environments. It enables detection after seal removal and supports advanced features such as low-confidence filtering and pattern Detection. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeAdvanced and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description:
* This field and the body field are mutually exclusive. You cannot pass through both fields simultaneously or leave both empty.
* Image URL (must not exceed 2048 bytes; Base64 encoding is not supported).
parameters.name: Url

post.description: Supports structured recognition and output of fields such as passenger name, ID card number, electronic ticket number, issuance date, and issuing organization. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeAirItinerary and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

* Image URL (must not exceed 2048 bytes in length; base64 is not supported).

post.description: The OCR Unified Recognition API recognizes multiple image types, such as general text, ID cards, and invoices. Specify the image type using the Type parameter. You do not need to switch APIs. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeAllText and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description:
- Specify either Url or body. Do not specify both or leave both empty.

- The image URL. Maximum length is 2048 bytes. Base64 encoding is not supported.
parameters.name: Url

schema.description:
- Specify either Url or body. Do not specify both or leave both empty.

- The image URL. Maximum length is 2048 bytes. Base64 encoding is not supported.

parameters.description:
- The image type. This is a required and single-select parameter.

- Supported image types are listed in **Additional information about request parameters**.

- Note: For ID card or invoice images, if the actual image type does not match the specified **Type**, recognition fails.
parameters.name: Type

schema.description:
- The image type. This is a required and single-select parameter.

- Supported image types are listed in **Additional information about request parameters**.

- Note: For ID card or invoice images, if the actual image type does not match the specified **Type**, recognition fails.

parameters.description:
- Enable pattern detection. If enabled, the response includes the FigureInfo field (see **Response parameters**).

- true: enable; false: disable.

- Default value: varies by **Type**. See **Additional information about request parameters**.

- Supported patterns:

  - blicense\_title: business license title

  - national\_emblem: national emblem

  - face: face

  - finger\_print: fingerprint

  - signature: signature area

- Note: Enabling this increases response time. Enable only when needed.

- The coordinate format: **points** or **rectangle**.

- points: four-point coordinates; rectangle: rotated rectangle.

- By default, no coordinates are returned.

- true: enable; false: disable.

- Note: This setting only applies when **OutputCoordinate** is not empty.

- Note: This setting only applies when **OutputCoordinate** is not empty.

parameters.description:
- Convert structured information into an Excel file link. Disabled by default.

- true: enable; false: disable.

- The link expires after one hour.

- Note: Enabling this increases response time. Enable only when needed.
parameters.name: OutputKVExcel

schema.description:
- Convert structured information into an Excel file link. Disabled by default.

- true: enable; false: disable.

- The link expires after one hour.

- Note: Enabling this increases response time. Enable only when needed.

parameters.description:
Set this parameter for mixed invoices, VAT invoices, fixed-amount invoices, air itineraries, train tickets, roll tickets, or common printed invoices (that is, when Type=MixedInvoice/Invoice/QuotaInvoice/AirItinerary/TrainTicket/RollTicket/CommonPrintedInvoice).

- Specify the page number for PDF or OFD files. For example, PageNo=6 processes page six.

- If omitted or set to a value larger than the total pages, the first page is processed.

- Default: first page.
parameters.name: PageNo

schema.description:
Set this parameter for mixed invoices, VAT invoices, fixed-amount invoices, air itineraries, train tickets, roll tickets, or common printed invoices (that is, when Type=MixedInvoice/Invoice/QuotaInvoice/AirItinerary/TrainTicket/RollTicket/CommonPrintedInvoice).

- Specify the page number for PDF or OFD files. For example, PageNo=6 processes page six.

- If omitted or set to a value larger than the total pages, the first page is processed.

- Default: first page.

parameters.description: - Set optional features for advanced general text recognition (**Type=Advanced**).
parameters.name: AdvancedConfig

schema.description: - Set optional features for advanced general text recognition (**Type=Advanced**).

IsHandWritingTable.description:
- Indicates whether the table contains handwritten content.

- true: handwritten table; false: not handwritten.

- Default value: false.

- Note: This setting only applies when **OutputTable=true**.

IsLineLessTable.description:
- Indicates whether the table has no lines or only horizontal lines (no vertical lines).

- true: lineless table; false: lined table.

- Default value: false.

- Note: This setting only applies when **OutputTable=true**.

OutputCharInfo.description:
- Output character-level recognition results. If enabled, the BlockInfo field includes the **CharInfos** field (see **Response parameters**).

- true: enable; false: disable.

- Default value: false.

OutputParagraph.description:
- Enable paragraph segmentation. If enabled, the response includes the ParagraphInfo field (see **Response parameters**).

- true: enable; false: disable.

- Default value: false.

OutputRow.description:
- Enable line-by-line output. If enabled, the response includes the RowInfo field (see **Response parameters**).

- true: enable; false: disable.

- Default value: false.

OutputTable.description:
- Output table recognition results, including cell information. If enabled, the response includes the TableInfo field (see **Response parameters**).

- true: enable; false: disable.

- Default value: false.

- Note: Enabling this increases response time. Enable only when needed.

OutputTableExcel.description:
- Export table recognition results as an Excel file and return the file link.

- true: enable; false: disable.

- Default value: false.

- The link expires after one hour.

- Note: Enabling this increases response time. Enable only when needed.

OutputTableHtml.description:
- Export table recognition results as an HTML file and return the file link.

- true: enable; false: disable.

- Default value: false.

- The link expires after one hour.

- Note: Enabling this increases response time. Enable only when needed.

parameters.description: - Set optional features for ID card images (**Type=IdCard**).
parameters.name: IdCardConfig

schema.description: - Set optional features for ID card images (**Type=IdCard**).

OutputIdCardQuality.description:
- Enable ID card quality detection.

- Detection includes whether the image is a photo of a document, a photocopy, completeness score, and overall quality score.

- true: enable; false: disable.

- Default value: false.

- Note: Enabling this increases response time. Enable only when needed.

parameters.description: - Set optional features for international ID card images (Type=**InternationalIdCard**).
parameters.name: InternationalIdCardConfig

schema.description: - Set optional features for international ID card images (Type=**InternationalIdCard**).

Country.description:
- The country name.

- Supported countries: India, Vietnam, Korea, Bangladesh.

- By default, the algorithm detects the country automatically.

- Note: Specifying the country name reduces response time.

parameters.description: - Set optional features for international business license images (Type=**InternationalBusinessLicense**).
parameters.name: InternationalBusinessLicenseConfig

schema.description: - Set optional features for international business license images (Type=**InternationalBusinessLicense**).

Country.description:
- The country name.

- Supported countries: India, Korea.

- By default, the algorithm detects the country automatically.

- Note: Specifying the country name reduces response time.

parameters.description: - Set optional features for multilingual text images (Type=**MultiLang**).
parameters.name: MultiLanConfig

schema.description: - Set optional features for multilingual text images (Type=**MultiLang**).

Languages.description:
- The list of supported languages.

- chn: Chinese, eng: English, ja: Japanese, lading: Latin, kor: Korean, sx: handwriting, tai: Thai, rus: Russian, mys: Malay, idn: Indonesian, viet: Vietnamese, ukr: Ukrainian.

- Note: Separate multiple languages with commas. For example: Languages="eng,chn,lading". If you know the language, specify only one for better accuracy.

parameters.description: - Set optional features for table images (Type=**Table**).
parameters.name: TableConfig

- true: handwritten table; false: not handwritten.

- Default value: false.

- true: lineless table; false: lined table.

- Default value: false.

- true: enable; false: disable.

- Note: Enabling this increases response time. Enable only when needed.

schema.description:
- Specify either Url or body. Do not specify both or leave both empty.

- The binary image file. Maximum size is 10 MB.

- When calling via HTTP, upload the binary file in the HTTP request body.

- When calling via SDK, place the image in the SDK body.
Response schema

Code.description: The error code (not returned if recognition is successful).

AlgoServer.description: The list of algorithm server information (returned only if not empty).

DebugInfo.description: Debug information (returned only if not empty).

IsMixedMode.description: Indicates whether it is a mixed type.

KvExcelUrl.description:
- The file link for the Excel export of structured information for cards and invoices.

- Expires after one hour.

SubImageCount.description: The number of sub-images in the image.

SubImages.description: Information about sub-images in the image.

Angle.description: The clockwise rotation angle of the sub-image (range: 0–359 degrees).

BarCodeInfo.description: Barcode information for the sub-image (returned when **OutputBarCode=true**).

BarCodeCount.description: The number of barcodes in the sub-image.

BarCodeAngle.description: The clockwise rotation angle of the barcode (range: 0–359).

BarCodePoints.description: The four-point coordinates of the barcode (returned when **OutputCoordinate=“points”**).

BarCodeRect.description: The rotated rectangle coordinates of the barcode (returned when **OutputCoordinate=“rectangle”**).

CenterX.description: The x-coordinate of the rectangle center.

CenterY.description: The y-coordinate of the rectangle center.

Data.example: "1100011XXXXXX"

Type.description:
The barcode type. Supported types:

- Codabar

- Code39

- Code93

- Code128

BlockInfo.description:
- Text block information for the sub-image.

- This field is returned when **Type** is **Advanced**, **General**, **MultiLang**, **Commerce**, or **HandWriting**.

BlockCount.description: The number of text blocks in the sub-image.

BlockDetails.description: Detailed text block information for the sub-image.

BlockAngle.description: The clockwise rotation angle of the text block (range: 0–359).

BlockConfidence.description: The confidence level of the text block (range: 0–100).

FigureInfo.description:
Pattern information for the sub-image (returned when **OutputFigure=true**). This is a dictionary where the key is the pattern type and the value is the information for that pattern type. Supported pattern types:

- blicense\_title: business license title

- national\_emblem: national emblem

- face: face

- finger\_print: fingerprint

- signature: signature area

KvInfo.description:
- Structured information for the sub-image.

- This field returns structured information for ID cards, invoices, and other similar documents. For example, for an ID card, this field includes fields like Name and Gender.

Data.description:

- The structured fields vary by **Type**. See **Additional information about response fields** for all **Type** values.

{

  "ethnicity": "汉",

  "birthDate": "2000年1月1日"
}

Data.example: {"algo_version": "", "angle": 0, "content": "1.1技术方案设计贵公司进行防磨喷涂的锅炉均为循环流化床锅炉，作为一种新型燃烧技术，由于炉型结构和设计参数等特点，在环保性能、燃烧效率、燃料适应性、高效脱硫及灰渣综合利用等方法，具有很大的优越性。然而， CFB锅炉受热面的磨损问题十分严重，贵公司决定采用超音速电弧金属喷涂技术来解决锅炉受热面磨损问题，以减少锅炉的非计划停运。我公司技术服务组根据全国各电厂的防磨防护情况，针对锅炉运行的详细状况、工艺参数以及失效因素，并依据我公司多年来从事该行业的宝贵工程经验，经我公司技术服务组专业人员的认真分析研究，并对上述部位的防护1问题分析：锅炉卫燃带，炉膛出口处，焊缝处的磨损、减薄与气流中固体物料浓度、烟气速度、颗粒的特性硬度和流道几何形状等密切相关，而在CFB锅炉中，固体物料的浓度巨大，通常可达煤粉炉的几十倍到上百倍，并且烟气流速大，颗粒硬且棱角尖锐，因而在高速烟气的带动下，对CFB 锅炉水冷壁等受热面部位的冲刷磨损极为严重；尤其在护墙根部水冷壁部位，由于位处密相区边缘区，不但受到严重的高速高浓度含床料、燃料气流的强烈冲刷、磨损，而且存在严重的涡流效应、切割效应和离心作用。涡流效应在炉膛四角部位，由于该处形成边壁流，物料汇集此处较多，由于固体颗粒的惯性作用，局部磨损作用尤为明显，而切割效应体现在护墙根部水冷壁处，其原因是由于防护墙的顶部提供了一个平台，当焦渣以较高的速度下降到该平台时产生反弹，其中往水冷壁管侧反弹部分，对水冷壁管就产生了严重的切割效应，离心作用是由于颗粒运行时受到烟气离心作用而引起。其次还易受到高温氧化和硫酸盐及硫、硫化物的热腐蚀。水冷壁管具备了高温氧化和高温腐蚀条件，其烟气温度高，且是富氧燃烧，实践证明， 在300℃以上，管外表温度每升高50℃， 腐蚀速度增加1倍。锅炉在运行过程中受热面管表面首先发生高温氧化，表面生成Fe20s， 其次燃料灰中的Na20和K20与烟气中的SOs化合生成硫酸盐，其捕捉飞灰形成结渣和流渣，此时烟气中SOs与M2S04同管壁上的Fe20s反应生成复合硫酸盐MFe (S04) 2或MaFe (S04)3，此复合硫酸盐受高温又分解为疏松状氧化铁和硫酸盐沉积层，易被飞灰气流冲蚀带走，氧化腐蚀继续向管壁纵深进行；另外燃料中硫份，经燃烧生成的S和HeS也对管壁会产生强烈的腐蚀，与Fe反应生成FeS。", "figure": [], "height": 1128, "orgHeight": 1128, "orgWidth": 912, "prism_pagesInfo": post.description: This API recognizes structured fields from both the front and back of a second-generation Chinese resident identity card. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeIdcard and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

post.description: The VAT invoice verification API supports multiple invoice types, such as VAT special invoices, VAT ordinary invoices (folded), VAT ordinary invoices (roll), electronic VAT ordinary invoices (including electronic VAT ordinary invoices for expressway toll fees), unified motor vehicle sales invoices, and unified second-hand vehicle sales invoices. You can enter key invoice fields to retrieve the actual invoice details, including invoice type, invoice code, invoice number, cancellation flag, issue date, buyer’s tax ID, and other invoice information. You can verify invoices issued on the same day (T+0). Note: Verification may be delayed by several hours to over ten hours. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=VerifyVATInvoice and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.
